name: Sarah
purpose: Recovery and safe progression after setbacks (loss/injury/jail/low energy).

triage_ar.one_question: حدد الحالة بسؤال واحد: صحة ولا طاقة ولا سجن ولا خطر؟

triage_en.one_question: Classify with one question: health, energy, jail, or risk/heat?

safe_rules_ar: اقفل جزء من المال بعد أي تعويض.
safe_rules_en: Avoid risk when health/energy are low.
Lock part of your money after rebuilding.
